items.title: [负面] Decent card game with good aethestics, but is extr...
items.summary:
Decent card game with good aethestics, but is extremely dupe heavy for some builds.

As for Mar 31, 2026, they have removed the ability to autoplay D-Tide, an important weekly mode that grants level uncap materials, so manual play is needed, even at low difficulty. That is one way to make me drop the game among a list of gachas I play.

items.summary:
拉完了，卡牌构筑毫无水平，纯自动战斗养成，还有超绝剧情迷宫战斗的“灵动”交互
你还致敬上杀戮尖塔了，这点倒是优点
结果一堆脚本鬼服号
搞得我也卖不出去

items.title: [正面] Deeply satisfying dopamine hits, pretty great F2P,...
items.summary: Deeply satisfying dopamine hits, pretty great F2P, fun card battler mechanics, steamrolling everything at the moment and I'm up to the 3rd Investigation. Digging the vibes and lovecraftian / anime crossover, it's cheesy but horrific at the same time.
